title: umbra-py index-info object
description: The JSON object umbra-py prints to stdout when 'umbra index info --json' succeeds: a machine-readable summary of a local catalog index. Produced from CatalogIndex.stats() plus the database's path and size. Stable within a minor version.

path.description: Filesystem path of the index database that was inspected.

size_bytes.description: Size of the index database file in bytes.

items.description: Number of acquisitions held in the index.

start.description: Earliest indexed acquisition date (YYYY-MM-DD), or null when the index is empty.

end.description: Latest indexed acquisition date (YYYY-MM-DD), or null when the index is empty.

tasks.description: Number of distinct Umbra tasks/sites represented in the index.

labeled.description: Number of acquisitions carrying a baked reverse-geocoded place label (from 'umbra index bake'); 0 when none have been baked.

thumbnailed.description: Number of acquisitions carrying a baked SAR quicklook thumbnail (from 'umbra index bake-thumbnails'); 0 when none have been baked.

built_at.description: The date the index was last built (YYYY-MM-DD), or null for an index written before build stamping or hand-assembled.
